# blocker hash vectors: the leading hostRecordLen (6) bytes of
# SHA256(pepper || name), big endian, hex.
# names are in normalized form (lower case, punycode, no trailing dot).
# asserted by BOTH blocker/main_test.go (generator hashHost) and
# ip_blocker_test.go (runtime blockHash / test helpers), pinning
# generator/runtime normalization+hash agreement without cross-imports.
pepper-hex 3031323334353637383961626364656630313233343536373839616263646566
ads.example.com 1fe91be0c085
tracker.net d4e0f3baf585
xn--bcher-kva.example 3f1fbdc4a8f5
a.very.deep.sub.domain.example.org 2644a4d92518
0-9digits-and-hyphens.example.net 681664516070
